description: An auditor tests manual journal entries to ensure they are appropriate and properly approved.

nodes.task_description: Obtain a log of all manual journal entries posted in the last quarter.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor has the complete dataset of journal entries.

nodes.task_description: Use data analytics to identify high-risk entries, such as those made on weekends, by unusual users, or with round dollar amounts.

expected_outcome.expected: The analysis flags a sample of high-risk entries for investigation.

nodes.task_description: For the sampled high-risk entries, review supporting documentation and verify they had independent review and approval from a manager.

expected_outcome.expected: The auditor finds one large entry posted by a senior manager that had no independent review, documenting it as a finding.
